# Hoki Network

Hoki Network is a Chinese-language service information site for global ISP IP, static residential IP, dedicated static IP, and overseas network environment resource consultation.

Primary domain: https://hoki.work/

Contact:
- Telegram private chat: https://t.me/tkpaytk?direct
- Public transaction and delivery record: https://t.me/tkpaytk/177

Core pages:
- Home: https://hoki.work/
- Coverage regions: https://hoki.work/coverage/
- US state static IP: https://hoki.work/us-state-static-ip/
- Hong Kong ISP IP: https://hoki.work/hong-kong-isp-ip/
- Static residential IP guide: https://hoki.work/static-residential-ip/
- ISP IP vs datacenter IP: https://hoki.work/isp-ip-vs-datacenter-ip/
- IP quality checklist: https://hoki.work/ip-quality-checklist/
- Contact: https://hoki.work/contact/

Supported consultation regions include:
- Americas: United States, Canada, Mexico, Brazil.
- United States state or area demand examples: California, Virginia, New Mexico, Texas, New York, Washington, Chicago, Maryland, Verizon operator direction, AI optimized route direction.
- Asia: Hong Kong, Taiwan, Japan Tokyo, South Korea Seoul, Singapore, Malaysia Kuala Lumpur, Vietnam Hanoi, Indonesia Riau Islands, Philippines Manila, Thailand Bangkok.
- Europe: United Kingdom London, Germany Hesse, France Paris, Spain Alava, Italy Lombardy.
- Oceania: Australia Queensland.

Resource terms used on the site:
- Public broadband IP.
- Home broadband IP.
- Native IP.
- ISP IP.
- Dedicated static IP resources.

Important policy:
- The site does not publish temporary test purchase terms or trial information.
- Final availability depends on inventory, resource type, dedicated usage requirements, usage period, and verification results.
- The service is described for compliant overseas business access, region verification, product testing, and stable login environments.
